zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Washburn於大約1648年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼度波利時，他的父親John Washburn Jr.11646歲，母親Elizabeth Mitchell21歲。他於大約1680年與Deliverance Packard在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼布利其沃特結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和8個女兒的父母。他去世於1732年12月之前在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼普萊姆斯布利其沃特，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼普萊姆斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Washburn于大约1648年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼度波利时，他的父亲John Washburn Jr.11646岁，母亲Elizabeth Mitchell21岁。他于大约1680年与Deliverance Packard在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼布利其沃特结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和8个女儿的父母。他去世于1732年12月之前在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼普萊姆斯布利其沃特，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼普萊姆斯。

nameMeanings.name: Washburn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Great and Little Washbourne (Gloucestershire), or Washbourne in Halwell (Devon). The Gloucestershire placename derives from Old English wæsse (genitive wæssan) ‘wet place, swamp, marsh’ + burna ‘spring, stream’. The Devon placename derives from Old English wæsce ‘place for washing’ + burna.
History: John Washburn came to MA in 1626 and settled in Duxbury, MA, in 1632.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Washburn was born about 1648, in Duxbury, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America, his father, John Washburn Jr., was 11646 and his mother, Elizabeth Mitchell, was 21. He married Deliverance Packard about 1680, in Bridgewater, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 8 daughters. He died before December 1732, in Bridgewater, Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, and was buried in Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Washburn est né environ 1648, à Duxbury, Plymouth Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, John Washburn Jr., avait 11646 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Mitchell, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Deliverance Packard environ 1680, à Bridgewater, Plymouth Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 8 filles. Il est décédé avant décembre 1732, à Bridgewater, Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, et a été enterré à Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Washburn um 1648 in Duxbury, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Washburn Jr. 11646 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Mitchell 21. Er hat um 1680 in Bridgewater, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America Deliverance Packard geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 8 Töchter. Er starb vor Dezember 1732 in Bridgewater, Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Washburn è nato il circa 1648 nel Duxbury, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America, il suo padre, John Washburn Jr., aveva 11646 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Mitchell, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Deliverance Packard circa 1680, nel Bridgewater, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 8 figlie. Morì prima del dicembre 1732, nel Bridgewater, Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, e fu sepolto a Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Washburnが約1648年にイギリス植民地アメリカプリモウス コロニーダクスブリーで生まれた時，父John Washburn Jr.は11646歳，母Elizabeth Mitchellは21歳であった。約1680年にイギリス植民地アメリカプリモウス コロニーブリジェワターでDeliverance Packardと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と8人の娘の親であった。彼は1732年12月以前にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニープリモウスブリジェワターで死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニープリモウスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Washburn(이)가 대략 1648년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 플림우스 콜론이 드스버이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Washburn Jr.(은)는 11646세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Mitchell(은)는 21세였다. 그는 대략 1680년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 플림우스 콜론이 브리지왓어에서 Deliverance Packard(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1732년 12월 이전 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 플림우스 브리지왓어에서 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 플림우스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Washburn nasceu aproximadamente 1648, em Duxbury, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America, seu pai, John Washburn Jr., tinha 11646 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Mitchell, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Deliverance Packard aproximadamente 1680, em Bridgewater, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 8 filhas. Ele faleceu antes dezembro de 1732, em Bridgewater, Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, e foi sepultado em Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Washburn родился около 1648 г. в местности дуксбури, плимоут колони, бритиш колоняль амирика, его отцу по имени John Washburn Jr. было 11646 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Mitchell, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Deliverance Packard около 1680 г. в местности бриджюэитир, плимоут колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 8 дочерей. Он умер перед декабрь 1732 г. в местности бриджюэитир, плимоут, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика и был похоронен в местности плимоут, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Washburn nació aproximadamente 1648, en Duxbury, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America, su papá, John Washburn Jr., tenía 11646 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Mitchell, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Deliverance Packard aproximadamente 1680, en Bridgewater, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 8 hijas. Murió antes de diciembre de 1732, en Bridgewater, Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, y fue sepultado en Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.
